overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player passes commercial storefronts, a Militech armored vehicle, and a police crime scene before entering a narrow alleyway. The environment features a mix of traditional and cyberpunk architecture with neon signage and elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with vending machines and red storefront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass

entered.detail: bright red building facade with large windows and neon signage
green-framed automated vending machines on the sidewalk
massive curved concrete overpass structure spanning the street
tall palm tree visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. A bright red commercial building with green-framed vending machines lines the left side, while the curved concrete overpass dominates the skyline ahead. The street is relatively empty with only a few parked cars visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with parked military vehicle and traditional restaurant entrance

events.description: large black Militech armored vehicle comes into view parked on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the armored vehicle and traditional restaurant entrance

notable_agents.action: Militech armored vehicle parked on the sidewalk with company logo visible

entered.detail: large black armored SUV with Militech branding and red accent lighting
traditional wooden entrance with sliding doors and potted plants
string of round red paper lanterns hanging above the restaurant entrance

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, a massive black Militech armored vehicle dominates the left side of the frame, parked beside a traditional Japanese restaurant entrance adorned with red paper lanterns. The elevated overpass continues to curve overhead while the street opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pedestrians and storefronts

events.description: UI notification 'CYBERPSYCHO SIGHTING LT. MOWER' appears on screen indicating a nearby threat

agents.ego_description: walking through a busier commercial area with pedestrians and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk including a child running ahead

entered.detail: green facade restaurant with neon lighting and counter seating visible through windows
blue and yellow arcade game cabinet on the sidewalk
floating digital advertisement display showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more populated commercial area featuring a green noodle shop with neon lighting and an arcade machine on the sidewalk. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as a UI notification warns of a cyberpsycho sighting nearby. The architecture mixes traditional and futuristic elements with holographic billboards visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: police cordon at intersection with crime scene tape

events.description: approaching police barricade with red and white crime scene tape blocking the road
turning right to navigate around the police barricade and continue down the street

agents.ego_description: approaching the police cordon and maneuvering around the barricade to continue

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer in green uniform standing guard at the barricade
bystanders in red clothing observing the crime scene behind the tape

entered.detail: red and white striped crime scene tape stretched across the street
black and white police vehicle parked near the intersection
large industrial building with massive circular vent emitting white steam

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a police cordon at an intersection, where red and white crime scene tape blocks the road and NCPD officers stand guard. Bystanders gather to observe while steam vents from a large industrial structure in the background. The player character turns right to navigate around the barricade, revealing more of the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved urban street with commercial buildings and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved street passing various commercial establishments

entered.detail: multi-story green building with various shop signs and air conditioning units
tall digital advertisement screen showing a woman's face
metal safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the crime scene, the camera proceeds along a curved street lined with a green commercial building on the left and large digital billboards on the right. The elevated highway structure remains visible overhead as the street gently curves uphill. Sparse traffic moves along the road while the sidewalk remains relatively empty.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between buildings with hanging decorations

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between tall buildings with overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alleyway between closely packed buildings

entered.detail: tight passage between buildings leading deeper into the district
red paper lanterns strung across the alleyway overhead
various neon signs and posters on the alley walls including KUTZURAGI CAFE

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching and entering a narrow alleyway between tightly packed buildings. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while neon signs and storefronts line the walls, including a cafe entrance. The space becomes more enclosed as the camera moves deeper into the alley, transitioning from the open street to a more intimate urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, industrial thoroughfare beneath an elevated highway into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit alleyway. It begins by walking past a red commercial building and green vending machines under the curve of a massive concrete overpass, moving forward until a black Militech armored vehicle and red paper lanterns appear on the left. As the camera advances into a more populated commercial zone, the environment shifts toward a mix of holographic billboards and neon noodle shops before encountering a police cordon marked by red and white crime scene tape. The scene then opens up along a curved street lined with digital billboards and industrial steam vents before the camera turns right to navigate around the barricade. Finally, the perspective leaves the open road to enter a narrow, enclosed corridor where red lanterns and glowing storefronts create an intimate urban atmosphere.
